channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Nine Inch Nails @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-16 03:00 — Nine Inch Nails at Chase Center. Nine Inch Nails is a legendary act with a strong live reputation, making this tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Bad Omens @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-03-28 02:00 — Bad Omens at Oakland Arena. Bad Omens is gaining traction in the alt scene and their upcoming tour is generating significant buzz.

item.title: Lauren Spencer Smith @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — Lauren Spencer Smith at The Fillmore. Lauren Spencer Smith's rising popularity and emotional songwriting make her a compelling live act.

item.title: Jeff Tweedy @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-26 03:00 → 2026-03-27 03:00 — Jeff Tweedy at The Fillmore. Jeff Tweedy's solo performances are known for their intimacy and depth, appealing to indie rock fans.

item.title: Grahame Lesh @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 → 2026-03-23 03:00 — Grahame Lesh at The Fillmore. The Unbroken Chain shows celebrating Phil Lesh's legacy are likely to resonate with Grateful Dead fans.

item.title: The Early November @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-02 03:00 — The Early November at August Hall. The Strokes are a significant name in rock, and their return to the stage is sure to attract a large audience.

item.title: ALASKA @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 — ALASKA at The Castro Theatre. ALASKA's performance at The Castro is expected to draw a vibrant crowd, showcasing her unique artistry.

item.title: Maggie Lindemann @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 — Maggie Lindemann at August Hall. Machine Girl's energetic live performances are a hit in the electronic scene, making this tour noteworthy.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Juvenile's return to the stage is sure to excite fans of hip-hop, especially with a new album on the way.

item.title: redveil @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — redveil at August Hall. redveil is an emerging artist in the hip-hop scene, and his live performance is anticipated to be impactful.

item.title: Father John Misty @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-03-25 03:00 → 2026-03-26 03:00 — Father John Misty at The Castro Theatre. Father John Misty is known for his captivating live shows, making this a must-see event.

item.title: Perfume Genius @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-03-27 03:00 — Perfume Genius at The Castro Theatre. Nick Lowe's classic sound and storytelling make his performance appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Machine Girl @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-03-22 03:00 — Machine Girl at Fox Theater - Oakland.

item.title: Lauren Spencer Smith @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — Lauren Spencer Smith at The Masonic.
